reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of learned filters and fluency, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects inductive closure, combinatorics, smooth scaling, and deceptive fluency into one skeptical explanatory frame.
falsifiable_why: Could be challenged by demonstrations of robust novel explanatory modes not traceable to inherited selection criteria.
explanation: Fluent outputs can mimic explanatory novelty while remaining constrained by historically inherited standards of selection.
